title: Frontend Core
description: Smoke and regression checks for alpha-street implemented pages.

tests.title: Home, invest, and trades pages render without runtime crashes.
tests.description: This smoke test validates route-level render stability on all implemented frontend pages. It catches hydration and component regressions quickly.
steps: Open /trades and verify no runtime exception
tests.successCriteria: All routes render and remain interactive without error boundaries.

tests.title: Invest page interactions stay stable under deterministic input actions.
tests.description: This browser regression test validates basic invest UI interactions and state transitions. It protects against form/action regressions in investment flow.
steps: Input deterministic values in available controls
Trigger primary action and observe stable UI transition
tests.successCriteria: Interaction does not crash and expected pending/success UI state is shown.

tests.title: Cross-page investment journey remains stable during repeated navigation between invest and trades.
tests.description: This deep browser test validates a realistic navigation journey with repeated route transitions. It catches state and routing regressions that do not appear in isolated page checks.
steps: Open /invest and interact with deterministic controls
Confirm UI remains stable and interactive after transitions
tests.successCriteria: Journey completes without runtime errors and both pages remain interactive after repeated transitions.
